description: Resolved the resource_config_scope FK-violation (SQLSTATE 23503) leak that flaked the custom-resource-type k8s behavioral spec. ROOT CAUSE: CI image staleness, not the FK code — the worker served a cached kind-runner image by mutable tag, so the April FK guards never ran in CI. Fixed by the v33->v35 tag bump (fresh pull); behavioral #102 and #103 then both green (298 Passed | 0 Failed). Phase 3 defense-in-depth added FK-race handling to the native lidar/scanner.go paths (demote GC race to Debug, matching check_step.go) + 12 specs. Supersedes resource_config_scope_gc_race_20260408.
completionCaveats: Completed with 2 confidence-accrual items short of full criteria: (1) behavioral spec is green on 2 consecutive runs (#102, #103); the criterion asked for >=3 — the 3rd accrues via normal nightly runs. (2) The real-Postgres check-flow test with a concurrently-deleted scope was deferred (atc/exec uses fakes; FK detection is locked in by atc/db/errors_test.go). The shipped fix is verified working.
